description: Limited-time winter promotional campaign featuring seasonal beverages with prize giveaways and entry mechanics tied to product purchases.
structural_recipe: Post seasonal winter-themed content featuring limited-time beverage promotions (hot chocolate, matcha). Include: contest framing with prize pools (mention specific rewards and grand prize), clear purchase entry mechanics ("buy any [product] to enter"), festive emoji use (❄️✨🎁), Arabic language copy with casual/friendly tone, emphasis on exclusivity and time-sensitivity. Structure as carousel or single post with call-to-action for participation and purchase eligibility rules.
why_it_works: Winter seasonal campaigns leverage urgency and scarcity principles during peak consumption season. Prize-linked promotions drive engagement by reducing perceived purchase risk and creating viral participation incentive. Saudi consumers respond strongly to festive, celebratory framing and explicit value propositions (large prize pools). Arabic-language execution with colloquial tone builds community trust and accessibility.
transplantation_caveats: Prize mechanics must comply with Saudi advertising regulations and avoid gambling-adjacent language
Winter season timing is shorter in Saudi climate—campaign may need earlier launch or adjusted seasonality
Ensure prize fulfillment and terms are clearly stated to avoid legal/trust issues
Verify platform compliance for giveaway/contest mechanics on Instagram
cultural_constraints: Maintain family-friendly festive framing appropriate for Islamic cultural context
Avoid imagery or messaging that conflicts with local values or religious observances
